mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user_role SET deleted = 1, updated_by = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_user_role (user_id, role_id, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES
(#{userId}, #{roleId}, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
